title: Ceramic Blue Tile
longDescription: This premium ceramic tile features a smooth blue glaze finish that brings a calm and elegant atmosphere to any interior space. It is made from high-quality ceramic material, ensuring long-lasting durability and resistance to scratches and moisture. Perfect for both wall and floor applications in kitchens, bathrooms, and living areas.

title: Marble White Tile
longDescription: This elegant white marble tile is designed to replicate natural marble while offering better durability and easier maintenance. Its polished surface reflects light beautifully and creates a luxurious interior feel suitable for modern homes and commercial spaces.

title: Wood Texture Tile
longDescription: This wood texture ceramic tile mimics natural wood grain while offering superior water resistance and durability. It is ideal for creating warm, cozy environments such as living rooms, cafés, and bedrooms.

title: Black Matte Tile
longDescription: A premium black matte porcelain tile designed for luxury interiors. It offers high durability, scratch resistance, and a sleek modern finish suitable for high-end architectural projects.

title: Glossy Grey Tile
shortDescription: Stylish glossy grey tile for floor and wall use.
longDescription: This glossy grey ceramic tile provides a modern and elegant look suitable for both residential and commercial interiors. It reflects light subtly, making spaces look more spacious and clean.

title: Stone Finish Tile
shortDescription: Rough stone texture tile for natural look interiors.
longDescription: A durable stone finish tile designed to bring a natural and earthy feel to interior and exterior spaces. It is strong, slip-resistant, and ideal for rustic designs.

title: Beige Sand Tile
shortDescription: Soft beige sand color tile for calm interior design.
longDescription: A warm beige sand-colored ceramic tile that creates a calm and soothing environment. Perfect for minimalist and natural-themed interiors.

title: Patterned Moroccan Tile
shortDescription: Colorful Moroccan style decorative pattern tile.
longDescription: This Moroccan-style decorative tile features vibrant patterns that add artistic charm to walls and floors. Perfect for accent areas, kitchens, and creative interior designs.

title: Glossy White Tile
shortDescription: Bright glossy white tile for modern clean look.
longDescription: A high-gloss white porcelain tile that enhances brightness and gives a clean modern aesthetic. Ideal for bathrooms, kitchens, and luxury spaces.

title: Granite Dark Tile
shortDescription: Durable dark granite finish tile for luxury flooring.
longDescription: A strong and premium granite tile with dark finish, designed for heavy-duty flooring. It provides a luxurious and bold architectural look.
